name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Why I got into politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Last week, I **gave a speech to New Hampshire Democrats at their state convention** \- where I talked about why I got into politics. I ran my first congressional campaign under the refrain, “**I’m a former Navy Admir****al, running on national security that begins at home, in health security.**”
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9930371/99015811/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTBmYzNmOC1mN2Q2LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhF1MnnIjYzX4yukdY94p1SdeNk1780pQ34dvkkRqnw=&emci=41d58d08-39d4-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=ea0fc3f8-f7d6-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&v=hCcsNIISiWo)**
My wife, Susan, and I watched as Alex, our then-four year old daughter was wheeled out of surgery with her saddened doctors beside her. **We couldn’t get the brain cancer** , they told us, and “she has three, perhaps nine months.” But our little warrior fought on, with the best medical specialists our nation could provide. With her courage, Alex beat that demon. I**knew then that I needed to answer to you, the American people. Because you had kept your word by providing the military healthcare coverage that saved our daughter’s life.**
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9930372/99015815/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTBmYzNmOC1mN2Q2LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhF1MnnIjYzX4yukdY94p1SdeNk1780pQ34dvkkRqnw=&refcode=em09142019healthcare)**
As Alex's treatment neared its end and I had left the Navy, I thought of the day when she'd begun her chemotherapy. Susan and I could not help but overhear in that small room the conversation of hospital counselors with the family of the young boy who was Alex's roommate. He had just been diagnosed with cancer. But they were struggling to find out how he could stay, because the family was without health coverage. Susan and I knew well the anguish that they were feeling. That showed me we needed to work towards a system where every family had the health coverage that we had for Alex.
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9930373/99015818/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTBmYzNmOC1mN2Q2LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhF1MnnIjYzX4yukdY94p1SdeNk1780pQ34dvkkRqnw=&refcode=em09142019healthcare)**
I changed from being an independent in the military to a Democrat to run for Congress. It was a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district where I had been raised. Bringing a sign my daughter had painted: “**Joe Sestak is walking in your shoes.** ”
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9930374/99015821/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTBmYzNmOC1mN2Q2LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhF1MnnIjYzX4yukdY94p1SdeNk1780pQ34dvkkRqnw=&refcode=em09142019healthcare)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9930375/99015825/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTBmYzNmOC1mN2Q2LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhF1MnnIjYzX4yukdY94p1SdeNk1780pQ34dvkkRqnw=&emci=41d58d08-39d4-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=ea0fc3f8-f7d6-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak

Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

body:
Friend,
Georgia is the most important state on the map in 2020. Don’t let anyone tell you otherwise.
Y’all, nowhere else are the stakes this high. Democrats can win 16 electoral votes for the presidency, defend one U.S. House seat, pick up another, finally win back a majority in the Georgia statehouse, and win a special election to the U.S. Senate. But that’s not all.
The most important race, the one that will make or break our efforts, is who we nominate to take on incumbent David Perdue in the 2020 Senate election.
Friend, Teresa Tomlinson is the leader we can count on to marshal our efforts in 2020 and turn Georgia blue.
Join me in supporting Teresa Tomlinson to be Georgia’s next U.S. Senator today with a pledge of support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-sept19-deadline?refcode=em091319-d&noskip=true&refcode2=510762d7-06d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68]
Teresa was the first woman to lead Columbus, as mayor, and she did it for eight years. As an attorney, she was the go-to expert for complex federal litigation that put her up against big banks and corporations that tried to pull a fast one on consumers.
At a time when Republicans are scaring billion-dollar industries away from Georgia with a draconian abortion ban, Teresa is fighting for women’s reproductive freedom, and she will stop the parade of extreme judicial nominees Mitch McConnell is passing through to Donald Trump’s desk.
One more thing – Teresa isn’t taking corporate PAC money for her campaign. She’s counting on supporters like you to power us forward. Make a donation today, and let’s flip Georgia blue. Thank you – now let’s go win Georgia.
Yours truly,
Governor Roy Barnes

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Reflections from Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Our plan for the debate worked phenomenally. I am evolving as a candidate and it feels great. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=306%2E377263%2E19bwyN) Friend -- Hello and thank you for the incredible support! What a week. I came away elated after the Houston debate. Here’s proof: We saw record traffic on our website in the hours after the debate, and the buzz about the Freedom Dividend dominated the airwaves. Perhaps my favorite was Trevor Noah dubbing me “the Asian Oprah.” People are waking up to the fact that we can think and act much bigger to improve our own lives. It was also tremendous to see supporters in Houston from all over the country -- you all are the best. Nothing like a Yang Gang party -- we take the party with us wherever we go. Our plan for the debate worked phenomenally. I am evolving as a candidate and it feels great. I am already looking forward to the next debate in October in Ohio. I want to commend my team in particular for their dedication and ingenuity. Even as I’m learning and evolving, they are too. We are fighting it out with the rulers of the political class in this country and we are gaining ground each and every day. We will catch up and surpass them at the right time. We are getting stronger by leaning into our own humanity. Who says that politics has to be a joyless slog? It’s no wonder that so many of our fellow Americans have tuned out. If we campaign in the best way possible, we can elevate the discussion and excite people in unprecedented ways, even transform the electorate. It’s a tall order, but the pendulum tends to swing dramatically in the other direction in national politics. And we all know who the opposite of Donald Trump is. ;) I’m doing some media in New York this weekend then it will be off to Boston and Philadelphia for rallies on Monday and Tuesday. Please come on out to the rallies and tell your friends! Then we stop in D.C. before heading to Iowa to campaign. Trips to Iowa and New Hampshire are great ways to measure our progress -- I see the enthusiasm growing each time. We are progressing very quickly. We have about four-and-a-half months before the voting starts. Let’s use every day. Your pumped up candidate, \- Andrew | **Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8623?t=2&akid=306%2E377263%2E19bwyN)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=306%2E377263%2E19bwyN) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=306%2E377263%2E19bwyN) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Your top issues were pretty clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's not too late to give your input on which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week.
|
---
| | Derek,

Recently, I asked you to take my fall survey and let me know which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington this week. [**If you haven 't had a chance to take it yet, it's not too late to give your input.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0ef/53d9897e/52aefc0d/1c8e3a4f/2958259460/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-stratresend2")

My team showed me the results so far, and your top issues were pretty clear. You want:
* To **secure our elections** from future foreign interference
* Progress on bipartisan, common-sense **gun safety laws**

I'm right there with you, Derek. Our nation is hurting in the wake of one mass shooting after another, and candidly, enough is enough. There are a number of common-sense gun safety reforms that Americans from across the political spectrum actually agree on. It's only the special interests and politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell who are standing in the way of bipartisan action to make our communities safer.

I'm also incredibly alarmed that our elections remain vulnerable to foreign interference. This is an issue I've been fighting hard on, despite Republican obstruction in the Senate. Still, we're making headway and gradually winning the bipartisan support we need to get this done before the 2020 elections.

These are two areas where we need action immediately, and I'm planning to keep up the fight in the Senate. But right now, I want to know what issue matters to you the most. **[Derek, if you haven't taken my fall survey yet, will you weigh in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0ef/53d9897e/52aefc0d/1c8e3a4f/2958259460/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-stratresend2")**

Thanks,

| | | Friend - Last week, Republican state parties in Arizona, Kansas, Nevada, and South Carolina decided that they will cancel their presidential primary elections and caucuses next year, silencing millions of Republican voters in an effort to undermine any member of the GOP who would dare challenge Trump. We know the playbook for Trump and his allies. They've made voter suppression for political gain a cornerstone of this administration. And the reality is that these efforts to suppress the vote are entirely legal even though they are wholly wrong. In this case, state parties can pick and choose whether to hold presidential primaries and caucuses, and because the law permits it, the remedies are limited. But your access to the ballot shouldn't depend on whether you're a Democrat or a Republican. Because in a democracy, every eligible American should be able to exercise their right to vote. We know that canceling elections won't be the only way Republicans try to block voters from the ballot before 2020. Because those who would silence the will of the people prefer a system that intimidates anyone willing to challenge the status quo. **[We 'll continue to step up and demand justice for voters at every turn, but we need your help. Can you donate today to ensure we have every resource to fight for free and fair elections?](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa505/34a064cc/18e9f25d/7031789/686418222/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE091419GOP")** Thank you for all you do,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Republicans shuttering polling places across the South
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, After the Supreme Court ruled that a key part of the Voting Rights Act was unconstitutional in 2013, the floodgates opened for states to pass restrictions on voting rights that disenfranchise minority voters and help keep the GOP in power. In the six years since that fateful decision, GOP legislatures and election offices closed 1688 poll sites in 13 states, with many of the closed sites clustered in the South. In Texas alone, they shut down 750 polling places. In some Texas counties, that's left upwards of 75% of polling stations closed, which is especially disastrous in rural counties where voters must take off work, drive long distances, and wait in long lines just to exercise their constitutional right to vote. Expanding voting rights should be a goal no matter what party you belong to \-- yet Republican-controlled state legislatures are overseeing this sweeping dismantlement of voting rights across the country. They are gerrymandering their states' election maps, creating poll taxes, and blocking automatic voter registration, all in an attempt to silence voters. Republicans know that their ideas aren't winning over any voters, so they now resort to silencing anyone who won't vote for them instead \-- and Democrats need to stand up to it. We need to rally and push back against the GOP's onslaught of attacks on democracy, and the only way we'll do this is vote them out and win these legislatures back. [**WDTO is ready to fight against the GOP for control of state legislatures, and we know they 're going to throw millions of dollars in dark money into every election they can, so we need your help. Please, every donation made, no matter how small, will go toward making true, lasting change in our elections. Could you support us with a donation of $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd60/6e9863e8/14a52847/1db0c33c/2600345174/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190914a.ND&refcode2=ZdZj1YaFBumUo0GJWNsz") Thank you for standing with us! -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd60/6e9863e8/14a52847/1db0c303/2600345174/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190914a.ND&refcode2=ZdZj1YaFBumUo0GJWNsz")

subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"Eighteen years after the Tuesday morning President Trump says ‘is seared into our soul,’ the nation paused to solemnly mark the events of the..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b30e874077&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**9/11 Anniversary: Trump Says Day Is 'Seared into Our Soul' as Nation Remembers 18 Years Later**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef35e935a8&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Eighteen years after the Tuesday morning President Trump says ‘is seared into our soul,’ the nation paused to solemnly mark the events of the 9/11 terror attacks and the nearly 3,000 people who were lost – but never forgotten,” Greg Norman reports. President Trump and the First Lady led a moment of silence with victims’ families at the White House before traveling to a remembrance ceremony at the Pentagon.

🎬 **Watch:** [President Trump and the First Lady honor 9/11 victims](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d18d81ac88&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**'We Pay a Debt of Honor': VP Pence, Others Remember Flight 93 Victims**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71b986063e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Pittsburgh Post-Tribune_
“Not far from where Vice President Mike Pence stood Wednesday morning at the Flight 93 National Memorial stands its 93-foot-tall Tower of Voices, where wind chimes of different musical notes symbolize each of the 40 individuals who thwarted another attack on Sept. 11, 2001,” Julian Routh writes.

**Vice President Pence:** [A “common field” became a “field of honor forever”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09e8922f1f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Democrats Should Give Trump a Win on His Trade Deal with Mexico and Canada**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a0c84903c5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
Even _The Washington Post_ ’s liberal editorial board agrees that House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) should allow a vote on President Trump’s trade deal with Canada and Mexico. “It’s better not to gamble with people’s jobs and income, even for an understandable political reason, unless overriding substantive policy concerns justify it. They don’t.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Keeps Winning on Immigration – Against All Odds. Supreme Court Decision is Victory for All**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39d79f9991&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“The Supreme Court’s decision late Wednesday allowing the Trump administration to implement its policy making it harder for migrants to qualify for asylum in the U.S. is a victory not just for President Trump, but more importantly for the American people and for the rule of law,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes.

**Promise kept:** [The border wall is going up fast!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=885902e12f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**CNN Tries to Blame Trump for the Obama Administration’s Leaks**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47a54c6b29&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“Here’s some advice for the media covering President Trump: If you don’t want to be accused of reporting fake news, don’t report fake news,” Marc Thiessen writes. This week, CNN falsely reported that President Trump mishandled classified information, when it turns out the leaks in question came from the Obama Administration. Oops!

**More:** [Eddie Scarry: “CNN’s big ‘mistakes’ all run in one direction: anti-Trump”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85742e0f01&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump’s Plan to Stem Border Crossings Gets Results**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4acb552e0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Politico_
“President Donald Trump’s plan to force Mexico to stem the flow of migrants across the southwest border of the U.S. appears to be working,” Ted Hesson reports. Border apprehensions plummeted to 51,000 in August after President Trump put pressure on Mexican officials to address illegal immigration across their country earlier this year.
---
|
---
| [**President Trump Is Making History For Black Colleges And Universities**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cee2240808&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
“It’s National Historically Black Colleges and Universities [HBCU] Week, and President Trump is marking the occasion like no president in history,” including with this week’s speech at the annual HBCU Conference, Paris Dennard writes. “Unfortunately, President Trump will never get the credit he deserves for all he has done for HBCUs.”
---
|
---
| [**‘Historic Milestone’: Senate Confirms 150th Trump Judicial Nominee**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=387777ac9d&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“The U.S. Senate confirmed President Trump’s 150th judicial nominee Wednesday, helping to fulfill the president’s campaign promise to remake the federal bench with a conservative bent,” Alex Swoyer reports. The tally so far: 105 lower federal court judges, 43 circuit court nominees, and two Supreme Court Justices.
---
|

name: Andrea
subject: put aside political theater
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Hi, folks!

My favorite part of this campaign has been seeing Tim on the trail, face-to-face with voters. The connections he makes are really special, and I'm proud of how hard he's working.

October's debate is right here in Ohio, and we need Tim's voice on that stage. Nobody else is as focused on the issues that matter to every day Americans. Tim is committed to putting aside political theater and just trying to help people.

[Contribute $3 to get Tim to the October debate](http://secure.timryanforamerica.%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=$3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+3+to+get+Tim+to+the+October+d&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_2_2&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_2_2")

Campaigns are chaotic, wild, crazy -- but they're also incredibly uplifting. When I see how people respond to Tim's common sense vision, it fills me with hope. We get nonstop questions about how to get involved, and that's how I know this campaign is on the right track.

Our moment is almost here, and it's because of grassroots supporters like you. Your help has gotten us this far, can we count on you again to get us to the October debate?

[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/fighting-for-you**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=$3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomfightingf&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_2_2&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_2_2")

Andrea

body:

| | Hello Peter, Opioid addiction has swept across the nation, aided and even encouraged by pharmaceutical companies who would rather see their profit margins grow than actually help Americans who are struggling and even dying. Now, American communities are left to suffer the consequences of these companies' criminal and destructive decisions, with no end in sight to the epidemic gripping so many areas of the country. Many communities are overwhelmed with the sheer scale of the opioid epidemic, and local municipalities are becoming increasingly desperate to stem the tide of this crisis before it causes more havoc. [**It 's time for Congress to take action -- they need to pass legislation that will tangibly help both the Americans struggling with opioid addiction and the communities already feeling the effects of the epidemic. name: Team Mackler
subject: The word is out:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Tennessee needs a leader with the right priorities.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa21f/18d6a294/4cf0aa40/26d6526b/3171870813/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | The word is out: James has a new opponent who has the full support of Trump's fundraising machine. [_**But Tennessee needs a leader with the right priorities. Chip in before our mid-month deadline ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa21f/18d6a294/4cf0aa40/26d65268/3171870813/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190914?refcode=jme190914_m&recurring=true") | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa21f/18d6a294/4cf0aa40/26d65268/3171870813/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190914?refcode=jme190914_m&recurring=true")
---
After President Trump spilled the beans about the campaign on Twitter, it took James' opponent nearly two months to get around to telling Tennesseans himself. The truth is, he's more concerned about pleasing his old boss than he is in serving Tennesseans.
Instead of calling for the end of a trade war that hurts Tennessee's economy more than any other state, James' opponent says don't worry because the "economy is booming" and "business confidence is high."
Rather than call for an immediate vote in the Senate on expanding background checks and protecting our elections from Russian interference, James' opponent touts Trump and Mitch McConnell's unconditional support and blames the "liberal media."
**James ' opponent has shown he's more willing to do whatever his Washington insiders tell him to do than he is in standing up for Tennesseans.**
James has been traveling across Tennessee this year meeting with voters and listening to what they need, and are not getting, from Washington. Those reports from the road aren't as rosy as James' opponent says they are, and that's not the type of senator we need.
Tennesseans need a senator willing to do what's right and who will stand up to any president when they're wrong. That's James Mackler.
[_**We need 150 more people to give before midnight tomorrow to stay on track toward our $50,000 FEC goal. Chip in today ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa21f/18d6a294/4cf0aa40/26d65268/3171870813/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190914?refcode=jme190914_m&recurring=true")
| | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa21f/18d6a294/4cf0aa40/26d65268/3171870813/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190914?refcode=jme190914_m&recurring=true")
---
Thanks,
Team Mackler

|

body:
This fundraising deadline will be the first time in months that our numbers are released to the public | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e0b/45c30650/1317431c3/668b4617/2078663877/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're coming up on an FEC fundraising deadline in just two weeks, and we need your help to hit our goal. **Here's why it's important that you make your first donation today:**

This fundraising deadline will be the first time in months that our numbers are released to the public. Reporters and pundits across the country will pore over our public report to evaluate the strength of our campaign -- and how many people across the country have stepped up to own a piece of our movement.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Maine is absolutely CRITICAL to retaking the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Democrats are ready to retake the Senate in 2020 and continue the blue wave from 2018, and Susan Collins' Maine Senate seat is critical to doing that. Susan Collins spent decades building a reputation as an independent voice for Maine, but last year, even after Dr. Christine Blasey Ford's brave testimony, Collins cast the deciding vote to give Brett Kavanaugh a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. Though she claims to support _Roe v. Wade_ , she named the anti-choice judge's "judicial temperament" and his potential to "lessen the divisions" in our government. The voters in Maine have noticed their senator's betrayal. According to a Morning Consult poll, Susan Collins is now one of the least popular senators in America. Her net approval rating in Maine has dropped by 43 points in the past three years, showing how weak she is to being voted out. Democrats have NO CHANCE of taking back the Senate unless we win in Maine. Speaker of the Maine House Sara Gideon is running to flip the seat blue, and if we're going to help her hold Susan Collins accountable for her callous vote to silence sexual assault survivors, we need to hear from 130 more engaged Democrats by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Susan Collins?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd63/6e9863e8/14a0e1b7/1db0c305/4212039137/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LzqTuob") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd63/6e9863e8/14a0e1b7/1db0c305/4212039137/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LzqTuob") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd63/6e9863e8/14a0e1b7/1db0c30b/4212039137/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=WDTO20190914c.ND-b&refcode2=X8ZLi2f5jr7j2hRtV207")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If you chip in today, we'll even send you a free sticker as a thank you for helping grow our movement to put power into the hands of working people -- not the wealthy and well-connected. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e00/45c30650/13164e20e/668b41de/3260360002/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**[In just a few weeks, our FEC report will become public-- and we want it to show the biggest grassroots movement possible. Chip in any amount today and we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e00/45c30650/13164e20e/668b41c3/3260360002/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWQzLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IiBFTUo0NEZfU1RLX05GRl9UXzIwMTkwOTE0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-d3-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode= EMJ44F_STK_NFF_T_20190914_V1S1_P")**

When we launched this campaign, Elizabeth decided we'd run it differently.

She announced that we'd say no to holding private fundraisers where you can only get in with a big check. We'd say no to phoning up millionaires and billionaires to ask for money or for them to start a Super PAC.

She wanted this campaign to be built by the people that she's fighting for every day. That's you -- not the mega-wealthy and well-connected.

Reporters, analysts, and pundits across the country were skeptical whether her decision would pay off. But their opinions didn't matter to Elizabeth. She was going to run the campaign she wanted to run.

And each and every day since, we've built this movement together -- the right way. Instead of going to those fundraisers, Elizabeth has hosted over 130 town halls in 27 states and Puerto Rico -- and taken over 55,000 selfies with supporters. She's had the time to meet voters one on one, face to face, family to family at town halls and events across the country.

Those pundits are still skeptical -- but we have another chance to prove them wrong. After our September FEC deadline, we'll have to publicly report our fundraising numbers. Skeptics will be poring over our fundraising numbers to see if we've been able to continue to grow this movement with only grassroots donations.

She announced that we'd say no to holding private fundraisers where you can only get in with a big check. We'd say no to phoning up millionaires and billionaires to ask for money or for them to start a Super PAC. She wanted this campaign to be built by the people that she's fighting for every day. That's you -- not the mega-wealthy and well-connected. Reporters, analysts, and pundits across the country were skeptical whether her decision would pay off. But their opinions didn't matter to Elizabeth. She was going to run the campaign she wanted to run. And each and every day since, we've built this movement together -- the right way. Instead of going to those fundraisers, Elizabeth has hosted over 130 town halls in 27 states and Puerto Rico -- and taken over 55,000 selfies with supporters. She's had the time to meet voters one on one, face to face, family to family at town halls and events across the country. Those pundits are still skeptical -- but we have another chance to prove them wrong. After our September FEC deadline, we'll have to publicly report our fundraising numbers. Skeptics will be poring over our fundraising numbers to see if we've been able to continue to grow this movement with only grassroots donations. Now that we're at a critical moment in this race, we have to ask you: Can you chip in so we can send a powerful message to people across the country that a grassroots movement is not only possible -- but it will win?
